1.description: resolve Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct risk classes in quick-clay hazard areas to identify high risk class

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class within Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

5.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT kartleggingstatus
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade
WHERE kartleggingstatus = '8'
  AND ST_Intersects(
    omrade,
    (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' LIMIT 1)
  )
